title: Tenure lifecycle P2: component page, promoted primitives, motion vocabulary
summary: Created the Tenure / Components page (node 4:2437) and promoted twelve primitive families — Decision class chip (5 variants), Lifecycle dot tracker, Stage label / date block, Agent badge group, Stage banner, Cost panel, Gherkin caption, Console chrome band — each with descriptions and documentation specimens. Defined the motion vocabulary (four specimens with reduced-motion contracts) on the same components page. Swapped chip instances in Stage 01, Stage 02, and Stage 03 as proof-of-pattern (3 frames, chips only). Remaining 10 lifecycle frames carry local instances — listed as P2-1a outstanding. Token binding (fills/strokes/text to variable IDs) deferred to P2-1b. Bootstrapped Colour and Spacing token collections from canonical repo CSS.

payload.p2_1_status: Partial — 12 primitives promoted to components page; chip swap proof-of-pattern in 3 frames (Stage 01, 02, 03). 10 frames P2-1a outstanding for full lifecycle swap. Token binding to variable IDs deferred as P2-1b waiver.

frames: Stage 04–13 — Stage banner, Cost panel, Gherkin caption, Console chrome band instances not yet swapped

payload.token_binding_outstanding_p2_1b: All 12 promoted components use raw hex fills/strokes and raw pixel spacing set via hexToRGB(). setBoundVariable() and setTextStyleIdAsync() binding to Colour/Spacing variable IDs deferred to P2-1b dispatch. Visual parity confirmed; drift will occur if token values change before binding is applied.
